response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely matching the role's primary stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and developer tooling aligns well with the enterprise automation tooling focus, and his contributions to open-source projects and measurable impact in prior roles underscore his technical depth and initiative.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent development and scalable systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js (though Node.js expertise is strong)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not listed in the job description
German language skills are basic (though English is fluent)
